name: aioproductos
description: Run your AIOProductOS product board, product brain, first-party analytics, and support inbox from Claude Desktop — over one typed customer record that joins revenue, feedback, work, and code.
long_description: AIOProductOS is a product operating system: one shared record per customer that joins revenue, customer feedback, product analytics, work, and code. This desktop extension connects Claude Desktop to your workspace over MCP with 28 tools — read and move board tasks, read your product brain, capture feedback as insights, compute revenue-weighted NPS/NRR/funnels/retention, and work the support inbox and comms channels. Authentication is a single personal access token generated in AIOProductOS → Settings → Tokens & Agents; the token is scoped to your org and every call respects your row-level permissions. The extension stores nothing locally — each tool call is one authenticated HTTPS request to the platform. For a fully remote, OAuth 2.1 connection with the complete 39-tool surface, add the hosted connector at https://platform.aioproductos.com/api/mcp instead.

token.title: Personal Access Token
token.description: Generate one in AIOProductOS → Settings → Tokens & Agents. Scoped to your org; respects your permissions.
